worker_attempts.visible_answer:
Thank you, Kenji. I found your account, but I notice there's a discrepancy with the information provided. 

The phone number you provided (206-555-0293) matches our records, but the email address you provided (kenji.tanaka@gmail.com) doesn't match what we have on file.

Could you please double-check your email address? Alternatively, you can provide another piece of identifying information such as:
- Your date of birth

This will help me verify your identity so I can access your account balance.
